lineage.summary: The repository artifact is a bounded structurally enriched copy of the raw U-M encoding delivered in an Internet Archive Raw Michigan Book carrier. That carrier separately contains the encoding and a complete 408-TIFF facsimile of the 1903 Furnivall volume. The edition transcribes, collates, cites, or consults twenty-seven manuscript witnesses plus earlier printed/scholarly comparators; all facsimile, carrier, access, and rights layers remain distinct.
